ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the stock market data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price for the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price reached by the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price reached by the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price for the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price to account for corporate actions */,
  "dividend" TEXT /* Dividends paid on the stock on the given date */,
  "split_ratio" TEXT /* Stock split ratio on the given date */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" TEXT /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of the trading day (e.g., open, closed, holiday) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., exchange, third-party provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cik" TEXT /* Central Index Key (for SEC filings) */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the stock belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, trend analysis) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message to display when the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set up */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date the alert was last triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details of the dashboard */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was last accessed */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Whether the dashboard is shared with other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the widget belongs to */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., stock chart, performance table) */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details of the widget */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the widget was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the index data */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the index on the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the index data (e.g., exchange, third-party provider) */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the index on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data entry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the performance data */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Performance metric for the sector on the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the performance data (e.g., exchange, third-party provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_performance_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical sector structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sector_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the stock belongs to */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the mapping is effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_mapping_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_mapping_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the industry belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)
